heading: Index and digest of State legislation; preparation
label: 164 Index and digest of State legislation; preparation
text: The Librarian of Congress is authorized and directed to prepare biennially an index to the legislation of the States of the United States enacted during the biennium, together with a supplemental digest of the more important legislation of the period.
notes: Amendments1929—Act , repealed provision that the Librarian of Congress report biennially to Congress an index and digest of State legislation.Feb. 28, 1929
amendments: Amendments1929—Act , repealed provision that the Librarian of Congress report biennially to Congress an index and digest of State legislation.Feb. 28, 1929
